metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the expo-56 Claude Code skill: an offline, point-in-time reference for Expo SDK 56.

plugins.name: expo-56
plugins.description: Authoritative offline reference for Expo SDK 56 (React Native 0.85, React 19.2, Hermes v1) — for building new apps and migrating from SDK 55. Bundles 20 API reference docs. SDK 56 was in beta at snapshot time; treat as point-in-time.
